title: [epic fight]BD&Hill Reforge the Sword Edge
description:
This resource pack brings new 3D materials for ef, wom, and efr!
This material pack brings a brand new appearance and matching knife light with the model, as well as cool special effects to your weapons. And it is compatible with the latest EF version！
body:
This resource pack brings new 3D materials for ef, wom, and efr!
这个资源包为ef、wom和efr带来了新的3D材质！
This material pack brings a brand new appearance and matching knife light with the model, as well as cool special effects to your weapons. And it is compatible with the latest EF version(Including 1.16.5, 1.18.2 and 1.20.1)！
这个材质包带来了全新的武器外观和与模型匹配的刀光，以及酷炫的特效到你的武器上。而且它与最新的EF版本兼容(包括1.16.5,1.18.2和1.20.1)！
Model maker:I_Black_Demon_I

模型制作:I_Black_Demon_I

Special effects, texture pack maintenance:Hilljiaotatizi

特效，材质包维护:Hill脚踏梯子
Minecraft:
Wooden,Stone,Iron,Golden,Diamond,Netherite_Sword

Wooden,Stone,Iron,Golden,Diamond,Netherite_Axe

我的世界原版:
木，石，铁，金，钻石，下界合金的剑和斧

Epic Fight:
Wooden,Stone,Iron,Golden,Diamond,Netherite_Dagger

Wooden,Stone,Iron,Golden,Diamond,Netherite_GreatSword

Wooden,Stone,Iron,Golden,Diamond,Netherite_LongSword

Wooden,Stone,Iron,Golden,Diamond,Netherite_Spear

Wooden,Stone,Iron,Golden,Diamond,Netherite_Tachi

Uchigatana and Uchigatana Sheath

史诗战斗:
木，石，铁，金，钻石，下界合金的匕首，大剑，长剑，长矛，太刀

打刀与它的刀鞘

 
WOM:
Agony

Antitheus

Ender Blaster

Gesetz

Herrscher

Moonless

Ruine

Satsujin and Satsujin Sheath

Solar and Solar Obscuridad

Tormented Mind

奇迹武器:
痛苦长枪，反神之刃，末影爆破者/终末挽歌，律法之盾，统御者之剑，毁灭之剑，人斩/杀戮之刃/樱花与它的刀鞘，烈阳巨剑/太阳与它另一个形态，折磨/折磨之刃

EpicFight : Resurrection(Mod by Corrupt_Dog):
S_Iron,S_Diamond,S_Netherite_Tachi

S_Iron,S_Diamond,S_Netherite_Sword

S_Iron,S_Diamond,S_Netherite_LongSword

S_Iron,S_Diamond,S_Netherite_GreatSword

S_Iron,S_Diamond_Spear

史诗战斗:重生   附属(模组制作者:腐犬Corrupt_Dog):
强化铁，强化钻石，强化下界合金的太刀，单手剑，长剑，大剑/重剑

强化铁，强化钻石的长矛

 

 

You can get the latest updates on resource packs on Bilibili
你可以在哔哩哔哩上获取材质包最新动态
Hilljiaotatizi & I_Black_Demon_I(BD)
